attacks.name: Poison Whip
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Water Gun
attacks.text: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Totodile.

attacks.name: Ignite
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Yawn
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

power.name: Teleportation
power.text: As long as Abra has any Psychic Energy attached to it, the Retreat Cost for Abra is 0.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Dig
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Onix by attacks is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

power.name: Poison Spikes
power.text: If Cacnea is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if Cacnea is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Cacti Boost
attacks.text: Move a Grass Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another one of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fury Cutter
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Reignite
attacks.text: Search your discard pile for a Fire Energy card and attach it to Slugma.

power.name: Healing Shroom
power.text: Once per turn (before your attack), you may remove 1 damage counter from 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sleeping Mist
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Haunt
attacks.text: Draw a card.

power.name: Magnetic Pull
power.text: As long as Magnemite is your Active Pokémon, your opponent's Metal type Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 1 more.

attacks.name: Thunder Shock
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Poison Fang
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Quick Strike
attacks.text: Switch Ekans with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Tail Whip
attacks.text: During your next turn, Zigzagoon's Headbutt attack's base damage is 30.

attacks.name: Defense Curl
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Aron by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Iron Head
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

power.name: Rejuvenation
power.text: Whenever you attach a Water Energy card from your hand to Quagsire, remove 1 damage counter from Quagsire.

attacks.name: Mud Slide
attacks.text: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water or Fighting Energy attached to Quagsire but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 40 damage in this way.

power.name: Fungi Garden
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for a Grass Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Grass type Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Leech Life
attacks.text: Remove 2 damage counters from Parasect.

power.name: Molten Guard
power.text: As long as Magcargo has any Fire Energy attached to it, damage done to your Fire type Pokémon by an opponent's attack is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Molten Blast
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy card attached to Magcargo.

power.name: Poison Powder
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Scorching Swipe
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon is Burned, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

power.name: Aqua Boost
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Water Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Water Pokémon.

power.name: Growing Shadows
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if your opponent's Active Pokémon is Asleep, you may put Gengar from your hand onto Haunter (this counts as evolving Haunter) and remove all damage counters from Haunter.

attacks.name: Hypno Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Night Vision
attacks.text: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

power.name: Data Transfer
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Flash Chop
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Body Blow
attacks.text: You may discard any number of Fighting Energy cards attached to Machoke. This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy card discarded this way.

power.name: Call a Friend
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for a Pichu and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Dual Bolt
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. If Pichu is on your Bench, this attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon instead. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Milk Drink
attacks.text: Remove 1 damage counter from 1 of your Pokémon, except Miltank.

attacks.name: Rollout
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon. If tails, Miltank does 20 damage to itself.

power.name: Steel Plating
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a Metal Energy attached to Skarmory. If you do, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Skarmory during your opponent's next turn.

power.name: Steel Plating
power.text: As long as Lairon is your Active Pokémon, all Metal type Pokémon on your Bench take 20 less damage from your opponent's attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Metal Charge
attacks.text: Does 10 damage plus 20 more damage for each Metal Energy attached to Lairon.

power.name: Foreshadow
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Faint Attack
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

power.name: Foreshadow
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.text: Your opponent's Pokémon is now Confused.

power.name: Desert Veil
power.text: If Cacturne is your Active Pokémon, any damage done to Cacturne by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon ex are reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Sand Tomb
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

power.name: Flame Body
power.text: If Magmar is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if Magmar is Knocked Out), flip a coin. If heads, the Attacking Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Heat Burst
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Fire Energy attached to Magmar. This attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Scorpio Grip
attacks.text: You may switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with 1 of the Defending Pokémon. If you do, the new Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Bubble Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

power.name: Destiny Bond
power.text: If Wobbuffet is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if Wobbuffet is Knocked out), flip a coin. If heads, put 2 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

power.name: Static Dash
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a Lightning Energy card from your hand. If you do, you may switch Electabuzz with one of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunder Punch
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, Electabuzz does 20 damage to itself.

power.name: Ominous Presence
power.text: As long as Murkrow is your Active Pokémon, your opponent can't play any Supporter cards from his or her hand during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Sneak Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to one of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Toxic Insomnia
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned and Asleep. Put 2 damage counters instead of 1 on the Defending Pokémon between turns.

attacks.name: Mega Drain
attacks.text: Remove 4 damage counters from Venusaur.

power.name: Torrential Downpour
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a Water Energy card from your hand. If you do, discard 1 Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Overpowering Fang
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has no Energy attached to it, this attack does 40 damage plus 30 more damage.

power.name: Hot Soul
power.text: As long as Blaziken is your Active Pokémon, put 3 damage counters instead of 2 on Burned Pokémon between turns.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

power.name: Steel Shell
power.text: Any damage done to Scizor by attacks from Basic Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: X-Strike
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon has any Special Energy cards attached to it, this attack does 20 damage plus 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Cross Counter
attacks.text: This attack does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Hitmonchan.

attacks.name: High Jump Kick
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, Hitmonlee does 40 damage to itself and this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Breakthrough Kick
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokémon has Fighting Resistance, this attack does 20 damage plus 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Crabhammer
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Scavenger's Snatch
attacks.text: Your opponent discards a card from their hand.

power.name: Magnetic Field
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Metal Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Metal Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunderwave
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Shockwave
attacks.text: Discard all Lightning Energy attached to Magneton. This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.

power.name: Shed Skin
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may remove 1 damage counter from Arbok.

attacks.name: Bind
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Poison Fang
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Focus Energy
attacks.text: During your next turn, Light Hitmonlee's Precise Kick attack's base damage is 80.

attacks.name: Precise Kick
attacks.text: This attack's damage is not affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Precise Strike
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Aura Sphere
attacks.text: This attack's damage is not affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Hydropump
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sky Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

power.name: Dragon Ascension
power.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a basic Energy card from your hand to Rayquaza ex. If you do, you may switch Rayquaza ex with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Atmospheric Burst
attacks.text: Discard all Energy cards attached to Rayquaza ex.

power.name: Distortion World
power.text: As long as Giratina ★ is your Active Pokémon, your opponent can't play any Stadium cards from his or her hand.

attacks.name: Shadow Force
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy attached to Giratina ★. Prevent all damage done to Giratina ★ by attacks during your opponent's next turn.

power.name: Soaring Thunder
power.text: Once during your turn, if Zapdos ★ is your Active Pokémon, you may search your deck for a Lightning Energy card and attach it to one of your Lightning type Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

attacks.name: Hyper Bolt
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads. If all of them are tails, Zapdos ★ does 20 damage to itself.

name: Energy Search
text: Search your deck for a basic Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Professor Birch
text: Draw cards from your deck until you have 6 cards in your hand.

name: PokéNav
text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck, and choose a Basic Pokémon, Evolution card, or Energy card. Show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Put the 2 other cards back on top of your deck in any order.

name: Poké Ball
text: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Basic Pokémon or Evolution card, show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Energy Removal 2
text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and discard it.

name: Energy Restore
text: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, put a basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand. If you don't have that many basic Energy cards in your discard pile, put all of them into your hand.

name: Energy Switch
text: Move a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

name: Double Rainbow Energy
text: Double Rainbow Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex). While in play, Double Rainbow Energy provides every type of Energy but provides 2 Energy at a time. (Has no effect other than providing Energy.) Damage done to your opponent's Pokémon by the Pokémon Double Rainbow Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (before applying Weakness and Resistance). When the Pokémon Double Rainbow Energy is attached to is no longer an Evolved Pokémon, discard Double Rainbow Energy.

name: Metal Energy
text: Damage done by attacks to the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Darkness Energy
text: If the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to attacks, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Darkness Energy is attached to isn't Darkness. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

power.name: Solid Stone
power.text: As long as Regirock ex has any Fighting Energy attached to it, Regirock ex has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Seismic Feedback
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hammer Arm
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

power.name: Black Iron Coating
power.text: As long as Dark Registeel has any Darkness Energy attached to it, damage done to Dark Registeel by attacks is reduced by 20.

attacks.name: Corrosive Lockdown
attacks.text: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. As long as the Defending Pokémon remains Poisoned, it cannot retreat.

attacks.name: Shadow Crash
attacks.text: Discard a Special Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 20 more damage.

power.name: Sacred Ice
power.text: Whenever you attach a basic Water Energy card from your hand to Light Regice, remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Radiant Ice Beam
attacks.text: Remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon.
